title: Direct U.S.-Iran talks fail to reach resolution after lengthy negotiation
summary_full: Vice President JD Vance was leading the highest level of face-to-face engagement between leaders of the United States and Iran in decades.
summary_public: Vice President JD Vance was leading the highest level of face-to-face engagement between leaders of the United States and Iran in decades.

IR.evidence: U.S.-Iran talks fail to reach resolution
